headline: Semi wreckage deepens (KLAC -11.6%, TER -11.7%, ALAB -10.7%); RDDT +13.8% lone bright spot; NTNX long on deck

market_state.line: SPY -0.13% / QQQ -1.46%; SPY holds >50d; VXX stress 0.94 — regime says risk_on but semis bleeding hard, tighten entries.

actions.line: Early long setup in risk_on — signal agrees, clean 8% risk, half-size; research neutral, no veto.

watch.line: SMCI -5.7% AH — Taiwanese authorities detained personnel; legal/supply chain risk escalating, avoid longs.
RDDT +13.78%, MACD bullish, 2x rel vol — momentum intact but extended after today's rip.
CRWV -13.88%, 3x rel vol — sharpest vol-weighted seller; watch for bounce setup if support holds.
NBIS -17.0%, 2x rel vol — largest % drop in scan; need catalyst clarity before fading.
GLW -13.53% on big move flag — not typical semi name, check if SMCI supply chain spillover.

changed: Semi carnage continues but leadership shifted: LRCX off the tape, TER/ALAB/CRWV/NBIS added to wreckage
SMCI new catalyst (Taiwan detention) adds legal risk overhang to the complex
NTNX long take now active — no desk picks in prior scan
caveats: AH_POST scan as of 16:01 ET Jul 1 2026 — prices are post-close and may not reflect final prints; liquidity thin, spreads wider than RTH.
Regime reads risk_on on SPY metrics alone, but QQQ -1.46% and broad semi selloff suggest intraday conditions were materially weaker than label implies.
